Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum((bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh") * bs.weight) AS elec_minus_gas 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/db3d251a341eba9443007b79a4b45c2c63304c42474651057be9f5bd4bc3d67e/83900ba3-ecbf-4d82-bb28-fd3c38f6eef7/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
